reason: Enabling FIPS mode requires the kernel boot parameter fips=1, which cannot be applied to a running system; attempting to do so may render the system unbootable or break cryptographic functionality.
estimated_impact: reboot required; system may become unbootable; FIPS mode not supported on existing installed systems; may break cryptographic modules or applications expecting non-FIPS mode; requires a reboot to take effect; potential compatibility issues with FIPS-unaware software
